creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
James E. Housley once stated:

=Have you contacted the MAINTAINER about these patches?

I only CC-ed the original PR  to him. Christian Weisgerber said the port
does not  build right on  Alpha, which remains  a problem waiting  for a
clueful person to add a hopefully simple fix.

But the existing version is also marked as i386-only anyway.

	-mi
